title: Execution terminated due to tool description length
symptom: The workflow returns a 'terminated' error when using the Embeddings Ollama node connected to Qdrant. The AI Agent node does not call the LLM, and there are no relevant logs indicating a crash.
root_cause: The AI Agent in n8n can terminate execution if the description of the tool exceeds a certain character limit. In this case, a description of 3300 characters was too long, causing the tool to break and the execution to terminate without a clear error log.
fix_steps: Reduce the length of the tool description to under 600 characters
Re-run the workflow to verify it executes successfully
agent_instruction: Shorten the tool description to under 600 characters and save the workflow.
